prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-JUMBORACECAR-BLU-FD2111 Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Race Car Formula Max Jumbo Pull Back Cars, Blue, Boys Ages 3+ Description: Ready for a day at the racetrack? The Kidplokio Kids Friction Power Jumbo Race Car for boys is fitted with fast-moving wheels, full speed pull friction power and vibrant racing colors. With its sleek, aerodynamic profile and durable construction, toddlers and kids can pretend play like they’re at the race track.

Measuring 22 inches long, this oversized Formula Max race car is oversized, making playtime racing even more impressive and realistic. The toy car also comes with five race track marker accessories to ensure cars stay on track as they cross the finish line. And what’s even better? The jumbo toy car features pull friction power, meaning The Kidplokio race car comes ready to race right out of the box, no batteries required. With friction push power, little speed racers can hit the track right away by simply pulling back on the vehicle, then releasing it and watching as it easily glides along the floor solo or against other race cars.

Hours of pretend play await, as little competitors get ready to participate in their own Indy 500 race. And, not only does the toy car mean hours of awesome driving around the house, they’ll be engaging in crucial early educational activities like gross and fine motor skills, as well as cognitive development through imaginative pretend play playtime sessions.

Comprised of high-quality, non-toxic plastic material, this oversized Kids Friction Powered Jumbo Formula Max Race Car from Kidplokio will stand up well to lots of racing wear and tear, and makes an awesome gift for any little need for speed race car fanatic in your life. Search Terms: christmas gift hanukkah gifts toys for boys pretend play imagination friction powered gifts under 100 dollars holiday toy list 2021 cars race track speed racer vehcile accessories family games neighborhood wars Features: - FRICTION POWER RACE CAR TOY: Fitted with fast-moving wheels, friction power and vibrant racing colors, little ones who have the need for speed will love this race car; Made with non-toxic plastic materials and featuring a sleek aesthetic design, toddlers and kids can pretend play just like they’re at the race track - JUMBO SIZE TOY RACE CAR: Measuring 22 inches long, this oversized race car is oversized, making playtime racing even more impressive and realistic! The toy car also comes with five race track accessories to ensure race car drivers stay on track as they cross the finish line - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Hours of pretend play await, as little competitors get ready to participate in their own Indy 500 race! And, not only does the toy car mean hours of awesome driving around the house, they’ll be engaging in crucial early educational activities like gross and fine motor skills, as well as cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions - NO BATTERIES OR ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: The Kidplokio race car comes ready to race right out of the box, no batteries required! With friction push power, little speed racers can hit the track right away by simply pulling back on the vehicle, then releasing it and watching as it easily glides along the floor - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 22 x 9 x 6 inches; Colors: Red; Weight: 2.8lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
